mapper.sql: a.id, a.account, a.name, a.birthday, a.sex, a.email, a.avatar, a.phone, a.roleid, a.deptid, a.status, a.createtime, a.lng, a.lat, a.version,c.balance, a.bankUserName,a.bankcard, a.bankName, a.bankSecondName, a.idcard, a.sfkf

a.id, a.account, a.name, a.birthday, a.sex, a.email, a.avatar, a.phone, a.roleid, a.deptid, a.status, a.createtime, a.lng, a.lat, a.version,a.bankUserName,a.bankcard, a.bankName, a.bankSecondName, a.idcard, a.sfkf,

a.id, a.account, a.name, a.birthday, a.sex, a.email, a.avatar, a.phone, a.roleid, a.deptid, a.status, a.bankName, a.bankSecondName, a.idcard, a.createtime, a.lng, a.lat, a.version, a.bankUserName,a.bankcard,a.sfkf, c.fullname as deptName, d.balance

a.id, a.account, a.name, a.birthday, a.sex, a.email, a.avatar, a.phone, a.roleid, a.deptid, a.status, a.bankName, a.bankSecondName, a.idcard, a.sfkf, a.createtime, a.lng, a.lat, a.version, a.bankUserName,a.bankcard, c.fullname as deptName
id, account, name, birthday,password, sex, email, avatar, phone, roleid,salt, deptid, status, createtime, lng, lat, version,bankUserName,bankcard, bankName, bankSecondName, idcard, sfkf
mapper.select:
select
from sys_user a left join biz_wx_user b on a.phone = b.phone left join biz_yck_balance c on b.openid = c.openid where status != 3
and (a.phone like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%') or a.account like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%') or name like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%'))
and (deptid = #{deptid} or deptid in ( select id from sys_dept where pids like CONCAT('%[', #{deptid}, ']%') ))
and (createTime between CONCAT(#{beginTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{endTime},' 23:59:59'))
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status} where id = #{userId}
update sys_user set password = #{pwd} where id = #{userId}
update sys_user set roleid = #{roleIds} where id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select * from sys_user where account = #{account} and status != 3
